summary: Predict anything with AI Discussion | Link
content: Foresight by Lightning Rod is an OpenAI-compatible forecasting API for developers building forecasting agents, prediction bots, and decision tools. Ask a question about a future event and get a scored, calibrated forecast back. Unlike general-purpose LLMs, Foresight is trained and evaluated on real-world outcomes, with benchmark-verified accuracy, cheaper inference, and a drop-in API for forecasting workflows.
chineseSummary: 使用 AI 预测任何事情讨论 |关联
chineseContent: Foresight by Lightning Rod 是一个与 OpenAI 兼容的预测 API，供开发人员构建预测代理、预测机器人和决策工具。询问有关未来事件的问题，并获得经过评分、校准的预测。与通用法学硕士不同，Foresight 根据现实世界的结果进行训练和评估，具有经过基准验证的准确性、更便宜的推理以及用于预测工作流程的嵌入式 API。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 AI 与科技趋势信号，适合用于观察工具选型、产品机会、开发者关注点和技术路线变化。
